  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. Morning light through the window, dust moving slowly. I don't know what day it is. I don't know how long I've been here. The objects on the shelves feel like questions I haven't learned to ask yet.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",

      "target": "self",
      "content": "Notice the quality of silence in the shop — it's not empty, it's full of waiting",
      "impulse": 0.4
    }
  ],
